Title: Successful Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" in the username field.
2. Enter "testpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Invalid Credentials
Test Steps:
1. Enter "wronguser" in the username field.
2. Enter "wrongpassword" in the password field.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating invalid credentials.

Title: Empty Fields
Test Steps:
1. Leave the username field empty.
2. Leave the password field empty.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result: Error messages are displayed for both fields indicating they are required.

Title: Successful Registration
Test Data: Username: newuser, Email: newuser@example.com, Password: newpassword
Test Steps:
1. Enter "newuser" in the username field.
2. Enter "newuser@example.com" in the email field.
3. Enter "newpassword" in the password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the home page.

Title: Duplicate Username
Test Data: Username: existinguser, Email: existinguser@example.com, Password: existingpassword
Test Steps:
1. Enter "existinguser" in the username field.
2. Enter "existinguser@example.com" in the email field.
3. Enter "existingpassword" in the password field.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: An error message is displayed indicating the username already exists.

Title: Empty Fields
Test Steps:
1. Leave the username field empty.
2. Leave the email field empty.
3. Leave the password field empty.
4. Click the register button.
Expected Result: Error messages are displayed for all fields indicating they are required.

Title: Modify Personal Info
Test Data: New Username: updateduser, New Email: updateduser@example.com, New Password: updatedpassword

1. Click on the modify personal info button.
2. Enter "updateduser" in the username field.
3. Enter "updateduser@example.com" in the email field.
4. Enter "updatedpassword" in the password field.
5. Click the save button.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated profile information.

Title: Empty Fields During Modification
Test Data: New Username: , New Email: , New Password:
Test Steps:

2. Leave the username field empty.
3. Leave the email field empty.
4. Leave the password field empty.
5. Click the save button.
Expected Result: Error messages are displayed for all fields indicating they are required.

Title: Update Username Only
Test Steps:
1. Click on the modify personal info button.
2. Enter "updateduser" in the username field.
3. Click the save button.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated username in the profile.

Title: Successful Item Insertion
Test Data: Item Name: Test Item, Description: This is a test item, Image: testimage.jpg
Test Steps:
1. Click on the insert item button.
2. Take a picture of the item.
3. Enter "Test Item" in the name field.
4. Enter "This is a test item" in the description field.
5. Click the save button.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated items list including the new item.

Title: No Image Taken
Test Data: Item Name: Test Item, Description: This is a test item
Test Steps:
1. Click on the insert item button.
2. Do not take a picture.
3. Enter "Test Item" in the name field.
4. Enter "This is a test item" in the description field.
5. Click the save button.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated items list including the new item.

Title: Successful Item Deletion
Test Steps:
1. Click on the delete item button next to "Test Item".
2. Confirm the deletion.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated items list excluding the deleted item.

Title: Cancel Deletion
Test Steps:
1. Click on the delete item button next to "Test Item".
2. Cancel the deletion.
Expected Result: User is presented with the original items list.

Title: Propose New Exchange
Test Data: Item Name: Test Item, Description: This is a test item
Test Steps:
1. Click on the propose new exchange button.
2. Enter "Test Item" in the name field.
3. Enter "This is a test item" in the description field.
4. Click the save button.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated exchanges list including the new exchange.

Title: Accept Exchange
Test Steps:
1. Click on the accept button next to the exchange with ID "12345".
2. Confirm the acceptance.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated exchanges list where the selected exchange is marked as accepted.

Title: Reject Exchange
Test Steps:
1. Click on the reject button next to the exchange with ID "12345".
2. Confirm the rejection.
Expected Result: User is presented with the updated exchanges list where the selected exchange is marked as rejected.

Title: Apply Filters
Test Data: Filter Criteria: Category: Electronics, Price Range: $100-$200
Test Steps:
1. Click on the apply filters button.
2. Select "Electronics" from the category dropdown.
3. Set the price range to "$100-$200".
4. Click the apply button.
Expected Result: User is presented with the filtered items list based on the applied criteria.

Title: Cancel Removal
Test Steps:
